positive: A detailed, symmetrical celestial forest scene in the style of an ornate 19th-century botanical engraving and woodcut illustration. Central composition featuring a stylized, mythical owl perched on blooming crescent moons and intertwined thorny vines. The background consists of lush, exaggerated stylized flora, including curling fern fronds, glowing cosmic dust elements, and radiating mandala patterns. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, antique gold, and sepia ink, giving a monochromatic yet richly textured feel. Emphasize clean silhouettes, intricate cross-hatching, and extreme detail suitable for high-contrast screen printing on apparel. Highly detailed, art deco influence, perfect symmetry, full bleed.
